parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'syncBubbles', bubbles: ($json.bubbles || []).map(b => ({ id: b.id, type: b.type, title: b.title, parent_id: b.parent_id, color: b.color, description: b.description, tags: b.tags, priority: b.priority, deadline: b.deadline, executors: b.executors, status: b.status, checklist: b.checklist, created_at: b.created_at, updated_at: b.updated_at })) }) }}
